allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Complete Bartawi CMS backend implementation - Features 1-7

COMPLETE SYSTEM IMPLEMENTATION:
✅ Full database schema \(33 tables + 12 partitions\)
✅ Complete seed data \(453 rooms, 1359 records, 79 companies, 208 individuals\)
✅ 46 API endpoints across 11 route files
✅ Multi-tenancy with RBAC \(3 roles, 27 permissions\)
✅ JWT authentication with refresh tokens
✅ Audit logging system

NEW FEATURES \(4-7\):
✅ Check-in/Check-out workflows \(/api/occupancy\)
  - POST /checkout - Close occupancy, update room to vacant
  - POST /checkin - Create occupancy, auto-create entities, contracts

✅ Contracts management \(/api/contracts\)
  - GET / - List with urgency levels \(expired/critical/warning\)
  - PUT /:id/renew - Renew contracts, dismiss alerts
  - PATCH /:id/status - Update status \(active/terminated/legal_dispute\)
  - GET/POST /:id/notes - Contract notes timeline

✅ Reports system \(/api/reports\)
  - GET /rent-roll - Monthly rent roll with totals
  - GET /occupancy - Room-by-room occupancy status
  - GET /outstanding - Outstanding balances report
  - GET /summary - Combined occupancy + financial summary

✅ Notifications \(/api/notifications\)
  - GET / - List notifications with unread count
  - PATCH /:id/read - Mark as read
  - POST /read-all - Mark all as read
  - POST /:id/snooze - Snooze for 7 days

✅ Contract expiry alerts \(cron job\)
  - Daily check at 6 AM Dubai time
  - 90/60/30-day advance warnings
  - Auto-creates notifications for expiring contracts
  - Prevents duplicate alerts \(24h check\)

TECHNICAL DETAILS:
- ES6 modules throughout \(import/export\)
- Shared Prisma singleton for connection pooling
- Transaction safety on all critical operations
- Proper error handling and validation
- Production-ready and tested

DATABASE:
- PostgreSQL 15 with strategic indexes
- Partitioned tables for scalability
- Generated columns for auto-calculations
- Full audit trail support

Files modified/created:
- server/src/routes/occupancy.js \(234 lines\)
- server/src/routes/contracts.js \(154 lines\)
- server/src/routes/reports.js \(220 lines\)
- server/src/routes/notifications.js \(73 lines\)
- server/src/jobs/alertCron.js \(104 lines\)
- server/src/controllers/notificationsController.js \(new\)
- server/src/index.js \(updated with new routes + cron\)

Total: 785 lines of production-ready backend code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
